raw_consumer_statement:
Online merchant XXXX automatically charged me for XXXX subscriptions in the amount of {$91.00} each for a total of {$180.00}, orders were placed on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>. They never shipped out these products, and I tried numerous times to contact them, but their customer service line is disconnected, no response back to my emails, no responses back from social media DM 's, their social media account comments are also limited. 

I contacted my Macy 's American Express card to dispute these XXXX charges that were made using this card, and both disputes were denied without reason. I have reopened the disputes, called numerous times to be hung up and not given a reason why I can not get my money back for my losses.
